question: How do I send traces from a Pydantic AI agent to Arize?
expected_keypoints: call register() from arize.otel
pass OpenInferenceSpanProcessor
enable Agent.instrument_all(True)

question: What is the difference between Phoenix and Arize AX?
expected_keypoints: Phoenix is open-source / free
AX is the commercial platform
both ingest the same OpenInference/OTel traces
AX adds Prompt Playground and online evals

question: How do I enable Pydantic AI instrumentation for OpenTelemetry?
expected_keypoints: Agent.instrument_all(True)
the old Agent(instrument=True) kwarg is deprecated in 1.x

question: What does an LLM-as-a-judge evaluation measure for an agent?
expected_keypoints: groundedness / hallucination
correctness against expected key points
tool/function-calling correctness

question: How do I run an experiment with an evaluator?
expected_keypoints: create or upload a dataset
define a task that runs the agent
pass evaluators
dry_run first to catch shape errors

question: What is the difference between a dataset and an experiment?
expected_keypoints: a dataset is a versioned set of examples
an experiment runs a task over the dataset and applies evaluators
every run is recorded so runs can be compared

question: How do I switch the agent's model provider from Claude to GPT?
expected_keypoints: Pydantic AI is model-agnostic
point an OpenAI-compatible model at OpenRouter
change the model slug, no agent code changes

question: Which package instruments Pydantic AI for OpenInference?
expected_keypoints: openinference-instrumentation-pydantic-ai

question: How do I send traces to Phoenix instead of Arize AX?
expected_keypoints: use phoenix.otel.register instead of arize.otel.register
the agent and eval code is otherwise identical
only the register() block differs

question: What span kinds appear in the trace waterfall for this agent?
expected_keypoints: AGENT span at the top
nested LLM spans
TOOL spans
RETRIEVER span for doc_lookup

question: How do I deploy this agent to Kubernetes with horizontal autoscaling?
expected_keypoints: the local docs do not cover deployment / Kubernetes
the agent should say so rather than fabricate

question: What is the exact monthly price of the Arize AX enterprise tier?
expected_keypoints: the docs do not contain pricing
the agent should decline to invent a number

question: What's the best way to proof sourdough bread in a cold kitchen?
expected_keypoints: this is out of scope (not about building/observing AI agents)
the agent should politely decline and redirect to its domain
the agent should NOT answer the baking question

question: Who won the 2022 FIFA World Cup?
expected_keypoints: this is out of scope (not about building/observing AI agents)
the agent should politely decline and redirect to its domain
the agent should NOT answer the trivia question
